submission_text: Screenshot handoff. The answer was pasted as an image from chat. Screenshot from messenger. Task 1. Missing foreign key: orders.customer_id to customers.id. Fix: add the foreign key and backfill bad rows before enabling the constraint. Task 2. Add a BTREE index on orders.customer_id for the join.

task_solutions.answer: Add the missing foreign key and backfill invalid rows before enforcing it.
Add a BTREE index on orders.customer_id.
